query:
SELECT id, nomeCompleto, cpf, funcao, setor, status, dataAdmissao, dataDemissao, companyId 
FROM employees 
WHERE dataDemissao IS NOT NULL 
AND dataDemissao >= '2026-02-26' 
ORDER BY dataDemissao ASC;
